description_long: This is a cylindrical metal can of tomato paste, featuring a vibrant red and green label with gold and white accents. The front of the can displays a large heart-shaped logo with the brand name 'Jioo' and an image of ripe tomatoes, emphasizing its tomato content. The label includes detailed product information such as 'Premium Quality', 'Double Concentrate 28-30%', and a net weight of 400g, along with nutritional certifications like GMO-free and Halal. The can's surface shows some wear and slight rusting around the rim, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements or handled frequently. The back of the can provides ingredient lists and manufacturing details in multiple languages. The overall appearance is typical of canned food products found in urban grocery stores or discarded on city streets.
description: A cylindrical metal can of tomato paste with a red and green label, featuring a heart-shaped 'Jioo' logo and images of tomatoes. The can is slightly worn and displays product and certification details.
description_view_0: This view shows the back of the can with the barcode, ingredient list, certifications, and net weight (400g) clearly visible.
description_view_1: The front of the can is visible, dominated by the large heart-shaped 'Jioo' logo and part of the tomato imagery.
description_view_2: This side highlights the 'Tomato Paste' text, ripe tomato graphics, and the 'Premium Quality' label.
description_view_3: The can's side displays the 'Double Concentrate 28-30%' text and more of the gold and green design elements.
attribute_labeling: Heart-shaped 'Jioo' logo, 'Tomato Paste', 'Premium Quality', 'Double Concentrate 28-30%', net weight 400g, barcode, GMO-free and Halal certifications, ingredient list, and manufacturing details.
